scope: no-training analytic reverse-kernel audit on fixed real six-site validation endpoints; no production change or Gate advancement

endpoint_selection.rule: first 64 six-site rows encountered in torch.randperm(len(val), seed=5702)

decision_rule.pass: only a unique score-only method satisfying all thresholds on both initializations may be proposed for diagnostic-only sampling of the existing seed-5601 checkpoint
decision_rule.tie: if multiple score-only methods pass, do not select by endpoint recovery; compare intermediate marginal calibration and learned-score robustness in a separately frozen audit
decision_rule.fail: if none pass, do not modify production; attribute failures using final-step translation posterior margin and endpoint automorphism strata
decision_rule.boundary: No result authorizes retraining, H1b, tensor conditioning, oracle work, relaxation, DFT or DFPT. The endpoint-aware reference cannot be selected for production.
